Daddy’s Home 2 (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $104,029,443Details
International Box Office $76,771,333
Worldwide Box Office $180,800,776
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,629,588
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,414,431
Total $13,044,019
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Father and stepfather, Dusty and Brad have joined forces to provide their kids with the perfect Christmas. Their newfound partnership is put to the test when Dusty’s old-school, macho Dad and Brad’s ultra-affectionate and emotional Dad arrive just in time to throw the holiday into complete chaos.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$29,651,193 (28.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,575 opening theaters/3,575 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $138,660,066

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 10th, 2017 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 10th, 2017 (Wide) (Netherlands)
November 10th, 2017 (Special Engagement) (New Zealand)
November 10th, 2017 (Wide) (Romania)
November 17th, 2017 (Wide) (New Zealand)
November 23rd, 2017 (Wide), released as Guerra de Papás 2 (Mexico)
Video Release: February 6th, 2018 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for suggestive material and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2499 (Cert #51259), 10/25/2017)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Daddy’s Home
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Generational Conflict, Step-Family
Release detail: Christmas in November
Social setting: Christmas
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Red Granite Pictures, Gary Sanchez Productions, Paramount Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office

Synopsis

Father and stepfather, Dusty and Brad have joined forces to provide their kids with the perfect Christmas. Their newfound partnership is put to the test when Dusty’s old-school, macho Dad and Brad’s ultra-affectionate and emotional Dad arrive just in time to throw the holiday into complete chaos.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$29,651,193 (28.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,575 opening theaters/3,575 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $138,660,066

November 23rd, 2017 (Wide), released as Guerra de Papás 2 (Mexico)

MPA Rating: PG-13 for suggestive material and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2499 (Cert #51259), 10/25/2017)
Running Time: 100 minutes

Genre:Comedy
